steps: Check scene safety. Verify the patient is on a firm, flat surface.
Check responsiveness: Shout and tap shoulders.
If no response, call 911 immediately (triggering auto-dialer).
Start chest compressions: Push hard and fast in the center of the chest.
Follow the on-screen rhythmic pulse for timing.
Ask 'Are you choking?'. If they nod, stand behind them.
Give 5 back blows between the shoulder blades with the heel of your hand.
Repeat 5-and-5 until the object is forced out or patient becomes unresponsive.
Administer Naloxone (Narcan) nasal spray if available.
If patient is not breathing, start rescue breaths or CPR.
Wait 2-3 minutes; if no response, give a second dose of Naloxone.
